notes: SDD v2 cycle. Sprints 1-6 complete. Sprint 6 (2026-05-13): /sdd:plan full v2 implementation — 4 items, sequential, all edits to plugins/sdd/skills/plan/SKILL.md. Added 5 new top-level sections (Prior-Sprint Process Notes, PRD State Check, Sprint-Mode Resolution, Sprint-Item Tag Validation, End-of-Command Handoff), revised Step 5 (Build Mode Choice) to confirm upstream-resolved mode, added one-line gates to Step 7 (validator precondition) and Step 11 (handoff emit). Close-sprint auto-checked 19 PRD ACs (aado-aadv, aadw-aadz, aaea-aaeb, aaec-aaeg). First real dogfood of Sprint 5's /sdd:build wrap-up phase — fired clean, expected behavior. No [FB:] tags on Sprint 6 items, so no v2-verification rows updated. No iteration-candidates surfaced; no story splits; no tech-debt entries. Close-sprint manifest in process-notes-sprint-6.md. Next sprint loop: continue (unchecked ACs remain, Unvetted empty). Sprint 7 candidates: Bug Fix 1, /sdd:polish re-open, /sdd:discovery, Interview Command Behaviors, /sdd:onboard Polish, Multi-Session Resume, Cross-Project Feedback Transfer. Historical-AC backfill gap (Sprints 1-4 shipped pre-Bug-Fix-2) is PRD-hygiene, not sprint work.
